description_long: This is a modern urban scooter with a streamlined body featuring a prominent front fairing in blue, integrated with dual headlights and turn signals. The seat is wide and black, designed for comfort, and extends over a storage compartment. The scooter has two large wheels with visible fenders, alloy rims, and a robust exhaust system on the right side. Rearview mirrors are mounted on both sides of the handlebar, which is straight and equipped with hand grips and controls. The rear section includes a red tail light and indicators, with a sturdy rear fender and a side stand for parking. The overall design is practical and aerodynamic, suitable for city commuting.
description: A sleek blue and black urban scooter with dual headlights, a wide seat, alloy wheels, and rearview mirrors, designed for city commuting. Features include a prominent front fairing, visible exhaust, and integrated lighting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue fairing, dual headlights, turn signals, and both rearview mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the wide seat, front and rear wheels, exhaust system, and side stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the red tail light, indicators, rear fender, and the back of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the exhaust system, wheel details, and the overall streamlined profile.
attribute_deck_design: wide, flat, and smooth with integrated footrests and no visible patterns
